'''Atril Tabanne''' of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] in the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]]. She was a graduate of the [[Imperial Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]], and was a [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] before defecting to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

==Biography==
In [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], Tabanne held the rank of [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]], and was assigned as [[Executive officer/Legends|executive officer]] of the captured [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] [[Ession Strike|''Night Caller'']]. As [[Wraith Squadron]] had a limited number of pilots qualified in TIE fighters, Atril's experience in that regard meant that she was used as a pilot as well as a bridge officer. When [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Choday Hrakness]] was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in the [[Battle of Talasea]], Tabanne took command of the ''Night Caller'' and was promoted to Captain. 

She temporarily relinquished command to [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] during the [[Battle of Ession]], as she wasn't confident enough in her current level of experience allowing her to perform some of the more sophisticated ship maneuvers he described to counter potential defensive attacks. In return she led Wraith Squadron's TIE fighter contingent in his place, but resumed command afterward.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Wraith Squadron]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Wraith Squadron (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
